en.noResultsText: Try different keywords or check your spelling.
en.emptyStateIntro: Use the search box above to find new and used Cat equipment, attachments, parts, and pages across wheelercat.com. Results appear here as you type — use a product name, model number, city, or several words together to narrow your results.
en.emptyStateNewText: Search by product type, model, or attachment name.
en.emptyStateUsedText: Search by model, location, hours, or price — and combine terms to refine your results.
en.emptyStateOtherText: You can also find locations, services, careers, and general information pages.
